description_long: This is a tall, freestanding wooden shelving unit with six evenly spaced horizontal shelves, designed for storage or display. The structure is rectangular with a slightly trapezoidal profile, wider at the front and tapering towards the back. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a rustic and natural appearance, with a dark brown finish. The shelves are open-faced, allowing easy access to stored items from the front. The sides and back are solid panels, providing stability and support. There are no visible doors, handles, or glass panels, making it a simple and functional piece suitable for urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public spaces.
description: A tall, dark brown wooden shelving unit with six open shelves and a solid back, featuring a rustic wood grain finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing six open shelves and the full width of the shelving unit.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and solid side panel of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back panel with visible wood grain.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other solid side panel.
